name: Emissions Dashboard
description: Climate emissions tracking dashboard with scope 1/2/3 breakdown, Sankey flows, and reduction target progress rings.

page_briefs.overview: Primary climate dashboard. Top row is a KPI grid with total CO2e, year-over-year delta, scope breakdown, and intensity metrics. Center hosts a scope-view emissions Sankey showing flow from activities through scopes to total output. Right column features the reduction target progress ring tracking pace against the net-zero goal.
page_briefs.scope-detail: Detail page for a specific emissions scope (1, 2, or 3). Horizontal bar breakdown shows category-level contributions with percentages and absolute tCO2e. Below, a chart grid displays trend lines, category share over time, and variance against plan.
page_briefs.targets: Reduction targets workspace. A row of progress rings shows each target with current vs goal, pace indicator, and time remaining. A chart grid beneath plots trajectory curves, baseline comparisons, and scenario forecasts for each target.

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with primary content column
